user.title: Select AI Provider
user.description: Choose which AI service to track usage for.

claude.title: Authenticate with Claude
claude.description:
To authenticate, [open this link]({url}) to log in with Anthropic.

After authorizing, paste the authorization code below.

Note: The code may include a '#' character - paste the entire string.

codex.title: Configure Codex (OpenAI)
codex.description:
Sign in once with the Codex CLI or app, then read the values from `~/.codex/auth.json` (or `$CODEX_HOME/auth.json`).

On the machine where Codex is installed, run:

**Bearer Token**
`jq -r '.tokens.access_token' ~/.codex/auth.json`

**Account ID** (optional — only for organization/workspace accounts)
`jq -r '.tokens.account_id' ~/.codex/auth.json`

Paste the values below. Codex rotates this token periodically; if usage stops updating, re-run the command and update the token here.

antigravity.title: Configure Antigravity (Google)
antigravity.description:
Antigravity signs in with Google OAuth. The simplest way to get these values is to sign in with [CodexBar](https://github.com/steipete/codexbar) or the `agy` CLI, which writes them to `~/.codexbar/antigravity/oauth_creds.json`.

On that machine, extract each value with `jq`:

**Access Token**
`jq -r '.access_token' ~/.codexbar/antigravity/oauth_creds.json`

**Refresh Token**
`jq -r '.refresh_token' ~/.codexbar/antigravity/oauth_creds.json`

**Client ID**
`jq -r '.client_id' ~/.codexbar/antigravity/oauth_creds.json`

**Client Secret**
`jq -r '.client_secret' ~/.codexbar/antigravity/oauth_creds.json`

**Project ID**
`jq -r '.project_id' ~/.codexbar/antigravity/oauth_creds.json`

The access token expires after about an hour. Provide the Refresh Token, Client ID, and Client Secret so the integration can renew it automatically.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your authentication has expired or been revoked. Please provide new credentials.

error.exchange_failed: Failed to exchange code for tokens. Please try again.
error.codex_auth_failed: Token rejected by the Codex API. Please check that it is valid.
error.antigravity_auth_failed: Token rejected by the Antigravity API. Please check that it is valid.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the API. Please check your network connection.

init.title: Usage Options
init.description: Configure polling interval. Note: the usage API has rate limits, so avoid setting this too low.
